description: This file defines an Express router for managing to-do items, including route handlers for listing, creating, retrieving, updating, toggling, and deleting to-dos. It also contains Swagger API documentation annotations for these endpoints.

methods.name: router.get
methods.description: Defines the GET route for listing to-dos and binds to todosController.list.

methods.name: router.post
methods.description: Defines the POST route for creating a new to-do and binds to todosController.create.

methods.name: router.get
methods.description: Defines the GET route for fetching a specific to-do by ID and binds to todosController.get.

methods.name: router.put
methods.description: Defines the PUT route for updating a to-do by ID and binds to todosController.update.

methods.name: router.patch
methods.description: Defines the PATCH route for toggling completion status of a to-do and binds to todosController.toggleComplete.

methods.name: router.delete
methods.description: Defines the DELETE route for removing a to-do by ID and binds to todosController.remove.
